text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I messed up! It really sucks getting injured...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But not like it's crazy painful or anything. I can
get back to training, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? But I'm not. I'm saying I can do it.
choice_data_list: Well, so long as you don't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Scaredy-cat much? I told you I'm fine.
choice_data_list:
We're going to hit the books until you're back
on your feet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What?! That's what you mean by rest?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Or, to put it another way, you're saying the only
way to get me studying is when I can't move,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No way, pal! No way am I studying! I'll be back on
the track in no time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan rests up and lets her injury heal
properly.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! See, you get it! Wanna head to the track?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Crap... I guess... maybe it does still hurt. You
gotta be kidding me. What a joke...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's not quite ready to get back to
training. She needs to focus on her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right, how's this? No complaints, right?
choice_data_list: Let's keep going. But don't be reckless.
Let's keep going. But don't be reckless.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're so stubborn. As if I could be reckless even
if I wanted to with you watching over me like a
hawk.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Meh. I guess that's reassuring or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Tosen Jordan makes a full recovery.
